heading: RETIREMENT FOR LENGTH OF SERVICE
label: 941 RETIREMENT FOR LENGTH OF SERVICE
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 941, consisting of sections 9651 to 9656, related to issue of serviceable material other than to Armed Forces, prior to renumbering as chapter 971 of this title.
